2324630.name: Running Riot Demo
2324630.description:
This is a demo for my upcoming twin-stick shooter roguelite: Running Riot! This demo shows some elements from the first Arc of the game (the full version has 3 Arcs), as well as two playable characters and RAD's. Blast your way from room to room, and try to defeat the boss at the end!

Running Riot is my first big game. It is still actively in development, and is currently in alpha. I'm looking for any and all feedback to make the game as great as it can be. If you like it, check us out in Early Access!
2324630.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
